parameters.subject: ={{ '❌ Case Failed: ' + $json.testTitle + ' (' + $json.filename + ')' }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

🚨 Test Case Failure Alert

Test File: " + $json.filename + "

Case Title: " + $json.testTitle + "

Status: ❌ FAILED

Duration: " + $json.duration + "

Error Details:

Automated report from Playwright Test Suite

" }}
